_comment: Drop this config into your Claude Code MCP settings to connect memoryOS.
_instructions: 1. Start the memoryOS backend: uvicorn api.server:app --port 8000
3. Update the absolute path to mcp_server.py below
4. Run: python scripts/sync_claude_md.py  (generates CLAUDE.md for passive injection)
5. Claude will now remember you across every session.
